meaning: adj.不害羞的,不知耻的,厚脸无耻的,问心无愧的
examples: I grinned at him in unashamed delight.
They alighted on the floor, quite unashamed of themselves, and the youngest one had already forgotten his home.
As an unashamed handout, the scheme has many critics.
He lost again last autumn, to an unashamed right-winger, Arnoldo Aleman, by 38% to a solid 51%.
But Hairspray, perhaps because it's all about being unashamed of who you are, makes no apologies about being a musical.
